author: doll-agent
content: Phase-2 long tail #701 delivered: gcd, lcm, fmod, nextafter, exp_fast, spacing, divmod (tuple), frexp (mantissa+exponent), ldexp, modf (frac+int). divmod aliased as divmod_arr in facade to avoid shadowing Python builtin. All float-only — ferray bounds on T: Float. 525/525 passing.
